chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 141 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.583/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.584/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 01.02.2024 Mr. Muhammad Uzair Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Mr. Zeeshan Haider Qureshi, Assistant Director (Law) of Election Commission of Pakistan, Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, Deputy Attorney General, Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General and Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh, present in Court in other matters, waive notice of this petition. Niaz Hussain Mangnejo, Focal Person of Deputy Commissioner / District Returning Officer, Khairpur has also shown his appearance in this petition. With consent of all present, this petition is disposed of in the terms whereby the Focal Person, present, undertakes that in addition to current Polling Station (GPS Tajjal Shareef), an additional Polling Station (GHS Misali Goth) would be established. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
